name: limitless
description: Pyro's curated Claude Code skill pack: article-pack, Codies Research, Surface-First Development, SearXNG, Suno Pack (authoring, real rendering via suno-pp-cli, experiment lanes, saga-synced field journals), Hivemind (collective-brain search: social + GitHub + web + papers, pivot chains, saved sweep configs), and Dojo. A small set of high-leverage skills for research, prototyping, publishing, web search, AI music, and verified skill authoring.
